title: Hiring Store Manager at Nerolac Select

jsonLd.title: Hiring Store Manager at Nerolac Select
jsonLd.description:
We at Nerolac Select are looking for an experienced Store Manager based out of Visakhapatnam. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Nerolac Select:
Nerolac Select is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Operations

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nerolac Select!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
